title: Issues
description: Review issues schema. Either a list of issues found during review, or an explanation that no issues were found. Uses anyOf discriminated union on the 'type' field.

anyOf.description: Variant indicating one or more issues were found during review.

type.description: Discriminator indicating issues were found. Must be the literal string 'issues_found'.

issues.description: List of issues found during review. Must contain at least one issue.

items.description: A single issue found during review, with optional skill and MCP recommendations.

text.description: Description of the issue. May contain markdown for formatting.

skills.description: Optional list of skill names recommended for the agent fixing this issue (e.g. 'test-driven-development', 'systematic-debugging'). Omit if no skills are needed.

mcps.description: Optional list of MCP server names recommended for the agent fixing this issue (e.g. 'context7', 'angular-mcp'). Omit if no MCP servers are needed.

anyOf.description: Variant indicating no issues were found during review.

type.description: Discriminator indicating no issues were found. Must be the literal string 'no_issues_found'.

explanation.description: Explanation of why no issues were found. May contain markdown for formatting.
